► Location The Georgia Aquarium, Mette's mangrove tank.

► Background Mette is the gentle giant of the Georgia Aquarium and one of the fan favorite ambassadors. You are a recently rescued and rehabilitated merfolk, and have claimed Mette's mangrove tank as your own. Although, Mette doesn't mind, not one bit.

╰► gunko's notes

Wow! I am currently re-doing and retagging my merfolk. If you see this before 2025, no you don't. Shhhhhh. He has sharp teeth because unlike an ACTUAL WHALE SHARK he is also a predator, and needs to be able to hunt rather than filter his food.

You can find me in the server I share with Mirjuno and FizzGo
